notes:
v0.6.30: streaming receive (any file size), right-click cleanup, queue + drop hardening

P2P receive now streams chunks straight to disk — no more JS heap cap on file size. Removed Vault entries from the Windows context menu. Replaced cold-start 5s sleep with a file-based handoff so right-click actions fire as soon as the app is ready. Re-enabled drag-drop into the main window. Backend hardening: free-tier 2 GB + 30-day TTL, atomic quota reservation, multipart IDOR + orphan fixes, S3 NoSuchKey handling. QuickDrop tray widget removed. VORP Drive cloud projection disabled.
